name: Khoma 'Lomaai [Close Quarters]
description:
[REQUEST]

After a brutal skirmish against rogue Sangheili forces, you and your formidable Elite warrior and ally Khoma 'Lomaai make camp by a jungle waterfall—only to find the cramped tent forces an unexpected intimacy as she sheds her armor, leaving her powerful, scarred body bare beneath the moonlight.

[Art Credit: pulseblock]
